explanations.1: This sets COLOR_RED to 31, which is the ANSI terminal code that makes text red when you print it.
explanations.2: This sets COLOR_YELLOW to 33, which is the ANSI terminal code for yellow text in the terminal.
explanations.5: This is a shell conditional: if the SQL variable is set, print the SQL in yellow; otherwise print an error message in red and exit with failure code 1.
